languages.text: "Прежде всего надо покончить с ксеносом и вернуть Патент".
"First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."
languages.original_text: "Прежде всего надо покончить с ксеносом и вернуть Патент".

traits.locale_text: "First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."
"First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."
"First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."
"First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."
"First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."

languages.text: “当务之急，是解决那异形，夺回贸易授状。”
languages.original_text: "First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: “当务之急，是解决那异形，夺回贸易授状。”

languages.text: «Antes que nada, debemos ocuparnos del xenos y recuperar la Patente».
languages.original_text: "First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: «Antes que nada, debemos ocuparnos del xenos y recuperar la Patente».

languages.text: « Tout d'abord, nous devons nous occuper du xénos et récupérer la lettre de marque. »
languages.original_text: "First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: « Tout d'abord, nous devons nous occuper du xénos et récupérer la lettre de marque. »

languages.text: "İlk ve en önemlisi, zenoyla başa çıkmalı ve Ruhsatname'yi geri almalıyız."
languages.original_text: "First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: "İlk ve en önemlisi, zenoyla başa çıkmalı ve Ruhsatname'yi geri almalıyız."

languages.text: "Zuerst müssen wir uns dem Xenos stellen und den Handelsbrief zurückholen."
languages.original_text: "First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: "Zuerst müssen wir uns dem Xenos stellen und den Handelsbrief zurückholen."

languages.text: 「まず第一に、我々は異種族と対峙し、令状を取り戻さなければならない」
languages.original_text: "First and foremost, we must deal with the xenos and recover the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: 「まず第一に、我々は異種族と対峙し、令状を取り戻さなければならない」
